items.name: composer
items.title: Composer
items.description: A composable AI chat input with stacked island panels, file attachments, suggestion chips, and context usage visualization.

items.name: tool-call
items.title: Tool Call
items.description: Universal tool call component with running/completed/failed status states. Works standalone for sequential calls or inside ToolTree for parallel execution.

items.name: tool-tree
items.title: Tool Tree
items.description: A composable tree visualization for parallel tool calls with L-connectors, expandable children, and hover timestamps. Wraps ToolCall children.

items.name: reference-item
items.title: Reference Item
items.description: A composable item row for sources, memories, findings, files, tasks, and agent activity with media, metadata, and action slots.

items.name: status-indicator
items.title: Status Indicator
items.description: The product-wide status vocabulary: one shape per state — check for complete, spinner for active, dashed circle for pending, clock for blocked, alert for warning and error — with sr-only labels.

items.name: observable-work
items.title: Observable Work
items.description: A step disclosure pattern for showing visible agent work, touched sources, state, and completion without exposing hidden reasoning traces.

items.name: decision-surface
items.title: Decision Surface
items.description: A composable confirmation surface for approvals, risky actions, clarifying interruptions, and rollback decisions.

items.name: file-lifecycle
items.title: File Lifecycle
items.description: A file attachment lifecycle pattern for drag states, validation, upload progress, rejection, retry, and removal.

items.name: agent-status-table
items.title: Agent Status Table
items.description: A rich operational table for multiple agents with status, active task, progress, confidence, cost, and last activity.

items.name: clarifying-questions
items.title: Clarifying Questions
items.description: A controlled question group for collecting missing requirements through text, single-choice, and multiple-choice prompts.

items.name: action-preview
items.title: Action Preview
items.description: A locked consequence preview for approvals, external actions, document changes, and rollback-aware agent work.

items.name: source-preview
items.title: Source Preview
items.description: A citation and provenance preview card with source title, excerpt, location, navigation, and open-source action.

items.name: artifact-document
items.title: Artifact Document
items.description: A source-backed output document surface with cited sections, missing-source states, version metadata, and review status.

items.name: usage-meter
items.title: Usage Meter
items.description: A compact token, cost, limit, and coverage meter for visible agent run budgets.

items.name: contextual-workbench
items.title: Contextual Workbench
items.description: A responsive agent workbench that keeps chat visible while opening an inspectable browser, source, diff, or artifact surface beside it.

items.name: effective-policy-preview
items.title: Effective Policy Preview
items.description: A compact settings summary showing the agent policy currently produced by autonomy, approval, notification, and memory controls.

items.name: memory-ledger-item
items.title: Memory Ledger Item
items.description: A provenance-rich memory row with scope, expiry, last-used metadata, source inspection, edit, and removal actions.

items.name: run-trace
items.title: Run Trace
items.description: A dense operational trace for background runs with source touches, status, warnings, timing metadata, and expandable recovery detail.

items.name: handoff-packet
items.title: Handoff Packet
items.description: An ownership-transfer surface for multi-agent workflows with sender, receiver, payload, source basis, receiver action, and recovery path.

items.name: review-workflow
items.title: Review Workflow
items.description: An end-to-end agentic review workflow block with observable work, source-scope clarification, locked action preview, and approval.

items.name: approval-workflow
items.title: Approval Workflow
items.description: A human-in-the-loop approval block with observable preparation, locked action preview, policy reason, expiry, and decision surface.

items.name: clarifying-workflow
items.title: Clarifying Workflow
items.description: A missing-decision collection block with structured answer options and a paused observable-work trace.

items.name: source-backed-artifact
items.title: Source-Backed Artifact
items.description: A provenance workflow block that pairs a source-backed output document with source previews and usage budget.

items.name: memory-review
items.title: Memory Review
items.description: A memory review queue block with provenance, scope, expiry, source preview, and save/reject decision.

items.name: run-monitor
items.title: Background Run Monitor
items.description: A background run monitoring block with an operational trace, visible run budget, agent status table, warnings, and blocked recovery path.

items.name: multi-agent-handoff
items.title: Multi-Agent Handoff
items.description: A multi-agent ownership transfer block with handoff packet, sender/receiver state, source basis, recovery path, trace, and agent status table.

items.name: agent-settings
items.title: Agent Settings
items.description: A durable agent policy settings block with clickable switch labels and effective policy preview.

items.name: workflow-phases
items.title: Workflow Phases
items.description: A sequential phase rail for orchestrated agent runs — status glyphs, agent-count/token/elapsed roll-ups, and phase-select filtering. Reuses the status-indicator vocabulary.

items.name: workflow-run-monitor
items.title: Workflow Run Monitor
items.description: A multi-phase agent-fleet monitor block for script-orchestrated runs — phase rail, plan-as-code inset, per-phase fleet table with density collapse, run budget meter, pause/resume/stop, and failed-phase recovery.
